name: purchase_order_number_present
expression: purchase_order_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(purchase_order_number)) > 0
description: purchase_order_number is required for Purchase Order extraction.

name: po_date_present
expression: po_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(po_date)) > 0
description: po_date is required for Purchase Order extraction.

name: buyer_name_present
expression: buyer_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(buyer_name)) > 0
description: buyer_name is required for Purchase Order extraction.

name: supplier_name_present
expression: supplier_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(supplier_name)) > 0
description: supplier_name is required for Purchase Order extraction.

name: line_items_present
expression: line_items IS NOT NULL AND JSON_ARRAY_LENGTH(line_items) > 0
description: line_items is required for Purchase Order extraction.

name: total_amount_present
expression: total_amount IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(total_amount)) > 0
description: total_amount is required for Purchase Order extraction.

name: subtotal_amount_non_negative
description: subtotal_amount should be non-negative when present.

name: tax_amount_non_negative
description: tax_amount should be non-negative when present.

name: total_amount_non_negative
description: total_amount should be non-negative when present.
